name: OrcaFiles
tagline: Encrypted file management — no cloud, no uploads
description: Browser-based encrypted file organizer powered by Lightchain AIVM. Organize, encrypt, and back up files locally with AES-256 — no server, no uploads, nothing leaves your device. AI auto-tagging and smart chat are powered by AIVM. Wallet login, LCAI payments, and tiered plans (Free / Home / Pro) make it the only file manager built natively on Lightchain.
